---
title: "Learning Calculus"
---

Interactive calculus lecture notes with video and Desmos graphs.

## Lessons

| Date | Topic |
|------|-------|
| Aug 19 | [Polynomial Graphing, Critical Points & Quotient Rule](lessons/calculus20250819.qmd) |
| Aug 21 | [Derivative Analysis & Quotient Rule](lessons/calculus20250821.qmd) |
| Aug 25 | [Product Rule, Chain Rule & Inverse Functions](lessons/calculus20250825.qmd) |
| Aug 28 | [Inverse Functions & Chain Rule](lessons/calculus20250828.qmd) |
| Sep 01 | [Optimization & Distance to Curves](lessons/calculus20250901.qmd) |
| Sep 05 | [Optimization on Ellipses & 3D Surfaces](lessons/calculus20250905.qmd) |
| Sep 11 | [The Number e & Binomial Expansion](lessons/calculus20250911.qmd) |
| Sep 15 | [Exponential Functions, Logarithms & Their Derivatives](lessons/calculus20250915.qmd) |
| Sep 18 | [Taylor/Maclaurin Series & Power Series of ln(1+x)](lessons/calculus20250918.qmd) |
| Sep 22 | [Derivatives of Trig Functions & sin(x)/x Limit](lessons/calculus20250922.qmd) |
| Sep 25 | [Derivatives of tan & sec — Graphical and Algebraic](lessons/calculus20250925.qmd) |
| Sep 29 | [Euler's Formula & Functional Equations](lessons/calculus20250929.qmd) |
| Oct 02 | [Derivative Techniques Review: Chain Rule, Logarithmic Differentiation & Inverse Function Derivatives](lessons/calculus20251002.qmd) |
| Oct 06 | [Limits Involving the Definition of e, Power Expansions & Higher Derivatives of Inverse Functions](lessons/calculus20251006.qmd) |
| Oct 09 | [Power Series from Known Expansions, Geometric Series & Partial Fractions](lessons/calculus20251009.qmd) |
| Oct 13 | [Related Rates: Connecting Changing Quantities with Derivatives](lessons/calculus20251013_1.qmd) |
| Oct 13 | [Related Rates: Distance, Shadows & Velocity Decomposition](lessons/calculus20251013_2.qmd) |
| Oct 16 | [Related Rates via the Physics (Vector Projection) Method](lessons/calculus20251016.qmd) |
| Oct 20 | [Related Rates — Spheres, Cones & Propagated Error](lessons/calculus20251020.qmd) |
| Oct 23 | [Propagated Error & Combining Measurements](lessons/calculus20251023.qmd) |
| Oct 23 | [Propagated Error & Logarithmic Differentiation for Percent Error](lessons/calculus20251023_2.qmd) |
| Oct 27 | [Motion in 2D: Velocity, Speed, Trajectories & Acceleration](lessons/calculus20251027.qmd) |
| Oct 30 | [Parametric Motion, Speed vs. Velocity & Proving the Circumference](lessons/calculus20251030.qmd) |
| Nov 03 | [From Trajectories to Integrals — Antiderivatives & the Area of a Circle](lessons/calculus20251103.qmd) |
| Nov 06 | [Antiderivative of the Semicircle: Geometry Meets Calculus](lessons/calculus20251106.qmd) |
